title: verbascum × selimense
intro: Verbascum × selimense, a hybrid plant species, is a flowering perennial native to Turkey and the Middle East, characterized by its tall stems and large, yellow or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Verbascum × selimense lie in its leaves and roots, which are rich in mucilage, a thick, protective substance that can soothe and calm irritated tissues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, Verbascum × selimense is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin irritations.
